# Problem Statements for Stress Testing

> Auto-generated batch 2 — 50 problems at varying depth (vague, semi-detailed, detailed) for self-healing loop.

## Media & Content Publishing

1. "We publish content and need to know what's working."

2. "Our digital media company publishes 500 articles per day across 12 websites. We track pageviews, scroll depth, time on page, social shares, and ad impressions. We want to build predictive models for content virality, optimize headline A/B tests in real-time, and attribute subscription conversions to specific content pieces. Our editorial team wants a dashboard showing trending topics before they peak."

3. "We're a podcast network with 200 shows. We need to consolidate download data from Apple, Spotify, YouTube, and our own hosting platform into unified listener analytics."

## Manufacturing Execution & Shop Floor

4. "We want visibility into our factory operations."

5. "Our discrete manufacturing plant runs 8 production lines with 200 workstations. Each line has PLC controllers logging cycle times, scrap counts, downtime events, and operator actions every second. We need OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) calculations in real-time, Pareto analysis of downtime causes, and shift-to-shift performance comparisons. Shop floor operators need touchscreen dashboards showing live production status."

6. "We make automotive parts and our customer requires full part genealogy — linking each finished assembly to every component lot, machine setting, and quality inspection result."

## Government & Public Sector

7. "Our agency needs to modernize its data systems."

8. "Our state transportation department manages 15,000 miles of highways, 4,000 bridges, and 500 traffic signal systems. We collect traffic volume data from 2,000 loop detectors, bridge inspection reports every 2 years, and pavement condition surveys annually. We need to predict road maintenance needs, optimize snowplow routes using real-time weather data, and publish a public-facing transportation dashboard for legislative reporting. All data must comply with FOIA requirements."

9. "We're a city government running an open data portal. We want to automate the publication of 300 datasets from 20 departments and track which datasets are most used by citizens and developers."

## Sports & Athletics Performance

10. "Help us use data to win more games."

11. "Our professional soccer club tracks player movement using GPS vests collecting position data at 10Hz during every training session and match. We also have video analysis tagging 50+ event types per game, physical test results, medical records, and opponent scouting reports. We want load management models to prevent injuries, tactical pattern recognition from positional data, and a recruitment scoring system that combines transfer market data with our performance metrics."

12. "We run a youth sports academy and want to track athlete development metrics over multiple seasons to identify talent and optimize training programs."

## Retail & Inventory Operations

13. "Our stores keep running out of popular items."

14. "We operate 800 retail stores with 50,000 SKUs each. Our POS systems generate 2 million transactions daily, and each store has a warehouse management system tracking receiving, put-away, and replenishment. We need store-level demand forecasting to reduce stockouts by 40%, automated reorder point calculations, markdown optimization for end-of-season inventory, and shrinkage detection by comparing POS data to physical inventory counts."

15. "We're launching an omnichannel strategy and need real-time inventory visibility across stores, warehouses, and our e-commerce fulfillment center."

## Construction & Project Management

16. "Our construction projects always go over budget."

17. "We manage 50 active construction projects ranging from $5M to $500M. Each project generates daily progress reports, equipment utilization logs, material delivery receipts, safety inspection records, and labor timesheets. We need earned value analysis dashboards, cost-to-complete forecasting using historical project data, and automated change order impact analysis. We want to detect cost overrun trends 3 months before they become critical."

18. "We're a general contractor and want to compare actual vs planned schedules across all our job sites to identify common causes of delay."

## Cybersecurity & Threat Intelligence

19. "We need to detect threats faster."

20. "Our SOC processes 50 billion log events per day from firewalls, endpoint detection systems, email gateways, cloud access security brokers, and vulnerability scanners. We need user and entity behavior analytics (UEBA) to detect insider threats, automated threat hunting using MITRE ATT&CK framework mapping, and mean time to detect (MTTD) reduction from 24 hours to 30 minutes. Our analysts are drowning in false positives — we need ML-based alert prioritization."

21. "We want to correlate security events across our on-premises and cloud environments to identify advanced persistent threats."

## Pharmaceutical & Clinical Research

22. "We need to speed up our drug development process."

23. "Our pharmaceutical company runs 30 active clinical trials across 200 sites in 15 countries. Each trial generates electronic data capture (EDC) forms, adverse event reports, lab results, imaging data, and patient-reported outcomes. We need real-time safety signal detection, automated data quality checks against CDISC standards, and risk-based monitoring dashboards that flag underperforming sites. FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliance is mandatory for all electronic records."

24. "We're a contract research organization managing clinical trial data for 50 sponsors. Each sponsor has different data formats and we need to normalize everything for regulatory submissions."

## Insurance & Claims Processing

25. "Our claims take too long to process."

26. "Our property and casualty insurance company processes 200,000 claims per year. Each claim involves adjuster notes, photos, repair estimates, police reports, and medical records. We need automated damage assessment from photos using computer vision, claims routing based on complexity scoring, subrogation opportunity identification, and reserve adequacy prediction. Claims cycle time must decrease from 30 days to 10 days."

27. "We're an insurer that wants to build a 360-degree view of each policyholder — combining claims history, billing, policy changes, agent interactions, and third-party data for better underwriting."

## Warehouse & Distribution

28. "Our warehouse is inefficient."

29. "We operate a 1-million-square-foot automated distribution center processing 100,000 units daily. We have conveyor sortation systems, automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS), and robotic picking stations — all generating event data. We need predictive maintenance for conveyor motors, real-time throughput dashboards showing bottlenecks, wave planning optimization based on order profiles, and labor productivity tracking by zone."

30. "We run 10 regional warehouses and want to optimize inventory placement across the network based on demand patterns and shipping cost models."

## Aviation & Airport Operations

31. "We want to reduce flight delays."

32. "Our airline operates 500 daily flights with 100 aircraft. We collect data from aircraft health monitoring systems, crew scheduling systems, passenger booking data, weather feeds, and air traffic control delays. We need predictive aircraft maintenance to reduce AOG (aircraft on ground) events, fuel burn optimization using flight data recorder analysis, and irregular operations recovery that automatically re-accommodates displaced passengers."

33. "We're an airport authority and want to predict passenger flow through security checkpoints to optimize staffing every 15 minutes."

## Water & Wastewater Management

34. "We need to manage our water system better."

35. "Our water utility serves 500,000 customers through 3,000 miles of distribution pipes. We monitor pressure, flow, and water quality at 500 points using SCADA. We need leak detection from pressure anomaly analysis, water quality compliance reporting for the EPA, demand forecasting for pump scheduling, and infrastructure replacement prioritization based on pipe age, material, and break history."

36. "We're a wastewater treatment plant and want to optimize our biological treatment process by correlating influent characteristics with effluent quality parameters."

## Legal & Contract Management

37. "We spend too much time reviewing contracts."

38. "Our legal department reviews 5,000 contracts per year ranging from NDAs to multi-year enterprise agreements. We want AI-powered clause extraction, risk scoring based on deviation from standard templates, obligation tracking with automated deadline alerts, and spend analytics showing total contract value by vendor, department, and category. Our attorneys need a searchable contract repository with full-text search and version comparison."

39. "We're a law firm managing 10,000 active matters. We want to predict case outcomes based on judge, jurisdiction, opposing counsel, and case type using historical data."

## Social Media & Community Management

40. "We want to understand what people say about us online."

41. "Our consumer brand monitors 50 million social media mentions per month across Twitter, Reddit, Instagram, TikTok, and review sites. We need real-time sentiment analysis with emotion detection, influencer identification and engagement scoring, crisis detection when negative sentiment spikes, and competitive benchmarking against 10 competitors. Our social team wants alerts within 5 minutes of a potential brand crisis."

42. "We manage an online community forum with 2 million members. We want to identify toxic content, highlight trending discussions, and measure community health metrics."

## Nonprofit & Fundraising

43. "We want to raise more money for our cause."

44. "Our nonprofit organization has 500,000 donors in our CRM. We track giving history, event attendance, email engagement, volunteer hours, and social media interactions. We want donor propensity models predicting major gift readiness, lapsed donor reactivation campaigns, gift amount optimization, and impact reporting showing how donations translate to program outcomes. Our development team uses Salesforce NPSP."

45. "We run grant-funded programs and need to consolidate outcomes data from 50 partner organizations for federal reporting requirements."

## Gaming & Interactive Entertainment

46. "Players keep leaving our game."

47. "Our mobile game has 10 million daily active users generating 5 billion events per day — session starts, level completions, in-app purchases, ad views, and social interactions. We need real-time churn prediction to trigger retention offers, matchmaking optimization to balance skill levels, A/B testing infrastructure for game balance changes, and LTV (lifetime value) models for user acquisition optimization. Latency for personalized offers must be under 200ms."

48. "We're a game studio and want to identify which level designs cause the most player drop-off to improve our game's difficulty curve."

## Smart Building & Facilities

49. "Our buildings waste too much energy."

50. "Our corporate campus has 20 buildings with 10,000 BACnet-connected HVAC, lighting, and access control devices. Each device reports telemetry every 30 seconds. We need fault detection and diagnostics for HVAC systems, occupancy-based lighting and temperature optimization, energy consumption benchmarking across buildings, and predictive maintenance for critical equipment. We want to reduce energy costs by 25% while maintaining occupant comfort scores above 80%."
